title: Meeting Schema
description: Schema for public municipal council or committee meetings.

id.description: Unique deterministic string identifier for the meeting instance.

schema_version.description: Semantic versioning string (e.g., 1.0.0) mapping to this contract.

title.description: The name or category of the meeting (e.g., Raadsvergadering).

date.description: The date of the meeting in YYYY-MM-DD format.

start_time.description: The scheduled local start time of the session (e.g., 19:30).

location.description: Physical chamber room description or digital video streaming URL.

url.description: Source portal URL linking directly back to the original meeting view.
